title: butia lepidotispatha
intro: Butia lepidotispatha is a species of palm tree that belongs to the Arecaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of South America, where it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The sap of the Butia lepidotispatha plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Butia lepidotispatha is often prepared as a topical ointment or infused in water as a tea to aid in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections.
